description:
This quiz assesses JavaScript proficiency across ES2015 to ES2022 features, gauging knowledge of modern syntax, language enhancements, and best practices. It is positioned as a light‑hearted, self‑paced multiple‑choice test with a casual, encouraging tone, suitable for developers seeking to benchmark their skill level.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) features, ES2020–ES2022 language updates, Modern JavaScript syntax and semantics, Module imports and component usage
Audience: Front‑end developers, JavaScript engineers, and students who want to validate their up‑to‑date JavaScript knowledge without a formal login process.
